title: Brazilian Sausage Skewers
description: A fermented and bouncy Brazilian dish featuring Italian fennel sausages, double-fry KFC style, and flexitarian-friendly, this recipe is a show-off for any occasion
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat
Cut the onion, bell pepper, and zucchini into large chunks
Thread the sausages, onion, bell pepper, and zucchini onto skewers
Brush the skewers with olive oil and season with salt, black pepper, and paprika
Grill the skewers for 10 minutes, turning occasionally
While the skewers are grilling, heat about 1/2 inch of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat
Double-fry the sausages by removing them from the skewers and frying them in the skillet for 2-3 minutes on each side
Return the sausages to the skewers and serve hot
